caption: In a podcast studio, two men are seated for a recording. One man wears a white shirt with suspenders, a bowtie, and a tall, grey, textured headpiece, while the other man wears a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT!" and a black baseball cap. Both men wear professional over-ear headphones and speak into microphones. The room features a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and several logos that read "BOSS TALK 101" and "HUSTLE." A logo for "BOSS TALK PODCAST" is visible in the lower left of each frame. As the sequence progresses, the focus shifts entirely to the man in the black t-shirt. He is shown from the chest up, speaking into his microphone while glancing slightly to his right. The background remains constant, showcasing the studio's branded walls and equipment throughout the sequence.
